news.title: Alchip: ASIC growth may outpace the broader GPU market
news.description: For the past three years, graphics processing units, or GPUs, have dominated the artificial intelligence boom. But Johnny Shen, chairman of Alchip Technologies, believes the next phase of the market may belong to something more specialized.

news.title: Anthropic co-founder warns of AI’s impact on jobs as Pope Leo XIV urges regulation
news.description: Christoph Olah warned that AI could displace human labour on a “very large scale”, at the same time Pope Leo XIV urged stronger regulation of the rapidly advancing technology.
